project_overview.description: Paste a video script → get production-ready, AI quality-controlled images. Built for fast-turnaround commentary and philosophy videos.

architecture.app.py: Streamlit UI — 1600+ lines, session management, image grid, feedback system, collection
architecture.modules/orchestrator.py: Pipeline controller — scene parsing → prompt building → image generation → critique loop
architecture.modules/scene_parser.py: LLM breaks video scripts into structured scenes
architecture.modules/prompt_builder.py: Scene → optimized image generation prompt with style presets and Story Bible
architecture.modules/image_provider.py: Modular image generation (Gemini, Seedream 4.5, DALL-E 3, Imagen)
architecture.modules/art_director.py: AI critique loop: 8-dimension scoring, 7.0 pass threshold, max 3 retries
architecture.modules/story_bible.py: Character roster + visual DNA for cross-scene consistency
architecture.modules/feedback_loop.py: Error Classifier (8 error types) + Prompt Surgeon for targeted retry fixes
architecture.modules/json_repair.py: 3-layer JSON recovery for broken AI responses
architecture.style_presets/: 8 JSON style configs (watercolor, noir, cinematic, sketch, synthwave, anime, philosophy, pixar)

changes: Core pipeline: Script Parser → Prompt Builder → Image Provider → Art Director → Orchestrator
7-dimension AI critique scoring with 7.0 pass threshold
Story Bible for character consistency
Streamlit UI with session management
8 built-in style presets
Per-image redo with optional guidance

v2.0.headline: Pass rate 50% → 100%, avg score 7.2 → 8.5, runtime 21min → 7min
changes: Seedream 4.5 via OpenRouter as new image engine
Art Director max_tokens 1500 → 8192 (prevents JSON truncation)
Scoring expanded from 7 → 8 dimensions (added character_fidelity)
Removed broken Seedream round-robin fallback — single-provider architecture
Fixed scene parser list-vs-dict bug
Renamed from 'Ancap' → 'Psimplicity'
NEW: feedback_loop.py — Error Classifier (8 error types) + Prompt Surgeon
FIX: redo_scene() no longer mutates shared Scene objects (copy.deepcopy)
FIX: Critique failures get honest 0.0 instead of fake 6.0
FIX: Character matching uses word boundaries (re.search r'\bAl\b')
FIX: Story Bible persisted across redo calls
FIX: Duplicate _API_COOLDOWN override removed
QC report now includes typed_errors array per attempt

v2.2.derived_from: Analysis of 13 QC reports (80 scenes, 109 critiques)
changes: Critique Retry Loop — retries critique call 2x before falling back to regeneration
3-layer JSON Recovery via json-repair library
Classifier thresholds raised: hard_fail→6, soft_fail→7
Story Bible prompt repositioned: CHARACTER LOCK + CONTINUITY MANDATE moved to top
Single-frame mandate: every prompt starts with 'SINGLE IMAGE FRAME'
Palette hex injection from story bible color_palette
User Feedback System: thumbs up/down on every image card, persisted to qc_report.json
User Override Collection: manual approval overrides AI score
Collect Approved button: gathers AI-passed + user-approved, excludes user-rejected
Gold 'USER PASS' badge on cards where user approved a failed image
Red 'USER ✗' badge on cards where user rejected a passed image
Override counter: +N user-approved, -N user-rejected
Collect All button retained as secondary option

lines_modified.what: Replaced dual-button collection (Collect Passed + Collect All) with smart 3-tier system: Collect Approved respects user overrides
Score badge shows USER PASS (gold) for approved fails, USER ✗ (red) for rejected passes

key_functions._save_user_feedback: L747-809 — persists verdict + note to qc_report.json, recomputes summary stats
key_functions.collection_logic: L1398-1481 — approved_paths = AI passed (unless user rejected) + user approved fails
key_functions.score_badge: L1569-1575 — renders USER PASS / USER ✗ / PASS / WARN / FAIL badges

algorithm: 4. If user_feedback exists: verdict=='approved' → include, verdict=='rejected' → exclude
5. If no user_feedback: include only if ai_passed

rules: user approved + AI failed → gold 'X.X/10 USER PASS'
user rejected + AI passed → red 'X.X/10 USER ✗'
AI passed, no review → green 'X.X/10 PASS'

contents.Psimplicity_v2.2.1_share.zip: 7.07 MB — shareable ZIP (no .env, no output, no .git)
contents.project_v2.2.1/: Full project source synced for laptop pickup

api_keys_location.note: Keys are NEVER included in the share ZIP

user_preferences.style: Prefers concise, direct responses. Professional output. No over-engineering.

resume_instructions: Feed this JSON to a new chat. The Psimplicity project is at E:\Antigravity Projects\script-to-image. Latest code is also synced to H:\My Drive\Shared Agents\_archive\psimplicity\project_v2.2.1\. The share ZIP is ready at E:\Antigravity Projects\Psimplicity_v2.2.1_share.zip. All patch notes are in the project root as PATCH_NOTES.md. The app runs via 'streamlit run app.py' on localhost:8501.
